values.name: blueprint
values.value: ={{ { documentType: 'BRD', canonicalSections: ['Executive Summary','Business Need','Scope','Stakeholders','Functional Requirements','Non-Functional Requirements','Integrations','Assumptions','Risks','Dependencies','Acceptance Criteria'], styleRules: { tone: 'formal_consulting', verbosity: 'medium', tableUsage: true, bulletsPreferred: true }, subsectionPatterns: {}, terminologyStyle: [] } }}

meta.description: Uses Claude to analyze sample documents and extract a canonical section blueprint (structure, tone, style, section order). Falls back to default BRD blueprint if no samples.
